implementationSummary: ProductionReadClientFactory and SandboxWriteClientFactory wrap TikTokClient with transport guards that reject disallowed HTTP methods/paths before request signing. Fujiwa is read-only; SANDBOX_VN is write-validation only.
assumptions: Layer 1 read POST allowlist matches verified contract-collection.md search endpoints.
Sandbox write allowlist will grow as Layer 2 contracts are verified.
risks: New TikTok endpoints must be added to allowlists explicitly — no implicit pass-through.
